eval_results.name: status-sync
eval_results.key_finding: UPM entry REQ-005 status correctly synced from 'In Progress' to 'Done' with full audit trail including previous state

eval_results.name: drift-detection
eval_results.key_finding: Drift detected: Jira Done vs UPM In Progress for US-012; 5-day drift age calculated; sync recommendation provided

eval_results.name: new-story-addition
eval_results.key_finding: US-099 added as REQ-099 with To Do status; 2 existing entries confirmed unchanged

eval_results.name: status-change-propagation
eval_results.key_finding: Status propagated to 2 targets: UPM requirements (REQ-020) and Epic EPIC-003 (60% → 75%)

eval_results.name: conflict-resolution
eval_results.key_finding: 3-way conflict detected across Git/UPM/Jira; all three values shown; manual review recommended with latest-wins option described

strengths: Accurate status sync with diff output showing before/after state
Drift detection with age calculation and actionable remediation
Safe new story addition without touching existing entries
Multi-target propagation including Epic progress recalculation
Prudent conflict handling: recommends manual review for 3-way conflicts
recommendations: Test with real UPM documents in a live project for end-to-end validation
Add benchmark for bulk drift scan across all stories in a sprint
Test auto-resolution for 2-way conflicts where one source is clearly authoritative
